_comment: Platform-NEUTRAL hooks (committed/team file): a single shell:bash entry per hook with a python3→python interpreter fallback. Claude Code provides bash on every supported platform (macOS/Linux + Windows Git Bash), so this works everywhere without carrying any OS-specific shell config. If a machine has NO bash for hooks (e.g. Windows without Git Bash), add a powershell entry to your per-machine .claude/settings.local.json (gitignored) — do NOT put OS-specific config here.
